description: Introduced a keyword-based pre-filter to improve classification accuracy for common misclassifications.
Added a two-step classification process using regex pre-filtering for common misclassifications, followed by LLM for final decision.
Added a routing mechanism to handle tricky pairs with specialized LLM calls for higher accuracy.
[instructions] Clarified UWAI GP category with specific phrases to reduce confusion with n/a.
[shots_per_class] Increase shots_per_class to provide more examples for each category, improving model differentiation between n/a and other categories.
[instructions] Clarified n/a to explicitly include general information requests or reports, addressing confusion with UWAI GP.
[fewshot_seed] Change fewshot_seed to explore different examples that might improve differentiation between categories, especially n/a and medical categories.
[instructions] Clarified n/a to explicitly include general information requests or reports without specific actions, addressing confusion with UWAI GP.
